rawCommits.subject: chore(server): log agent stream output summaries
rawCommits.body: Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: fix(specs): preserve timed-out spec drafts
rawCommits.body:
Keep streamed spec markdown recoverable when a model timeout interrupts create_spec and steer agents away from oversized spec payloads.

Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: fix(desktop): fail closed on unhealthy harness sidecar
rawCommits.body:
Kill the managed local harness process when it never passes the startup health probe so the desktop does not proceed with a broken sidecar.

Made-with: Cursor
rawCommits.cleanSubject: fail closed on unhealthy harness sidecar

rawCommits.subject: fix(interface): reduce task output persistence jank
rawCommits.body:
Reuse the IndexedDB connection across browser storage operations and debounce task-output cache writes so streaming updates do not repeatedly parse and rewrite localStorage.

Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: fix(server): bound stale auth and harness backpressure
rawCommits.body:
Cap stale auth fallback, fail closed for sensitive routes, and make harness WebSocket commands bounded with explicit delivery errors and redacted frame logging.

Made-with: Cursor
rawCommits.cleanSubject: bound stale auth and harness backpressure

rawCommits.subject: fix(interface): hide '/ for commands' hint in agent windows
rawCommits.body:
Floating desktop agent windows can be very narrow, so the input info
bar wraps and the orbit/environment indicators get pushed onto a
second line. Add a `compact` flag that's threaded ChatPanel ->
ChatInputBar and set on the chat surface inside AgentChatWindowPanel
to suppress the chat-mode commands hint there. The image/3d-mode
labels are kept since they convey active state, and the main chat
surface is unaffected.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: hide '/ for commands' hint in agent windows

rawCommits.subject: feat(image-gen): default to gpt-image-2 and expose generate_image tool
rawCommits.body:
Promotes gpt-image-2 to the first entry in IMAGE_MODELS (so the chat
input picker and the aura3d Image Generation app both default to it),
and adds a provider-less `generate_image` workspace tool so chat agents
can fulfil natural-language requests like "create an image of a cat"
without the user having to invoke the `/image` slash command.

The new tool routes through aura-os-server, drains the upstream
aura-router SSE stream, and returns the final `completed` payload as a
single JSON value shaped for `ImageBlock` (imageUrl, originalUrl, prompt,
model, meta). Includes mock-router unit tests covering the happy path,
upstream `error` events, and missing `completed` events.

Made-with: Cursor
rawCommits.cleanSubject: default to gpt-image-2 and expose generate_image tool

rawCommits.subject: fix(interface): keep middle panel mounted across app switches
rawCommits.body:
Lift the visible `ResponsiveMainLane` into `DesktopShell.mainPanelHost`
so the middle root panel survives app switches. Each app's `MainPanel`
now returns inner content only — the shell wraps everything in a
persistent lane that retains DOM identity across navigations, which
eliminates the size-snap flash where the wallpaper briefly showed
through before the new app's content rendered.

The new `bareMainPanel` flag on `AuraApp` lets the Desktop app keep its
transparent wallpaper-bleed surface (no lane chrome).

Made-with: Cursor
rawCommits.cleanSubject: keep middle panel mounted across app switches

rawCommits.subject: feat(server): add agent control callback endpoints
rawCommits.body: Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: fix(interface): restore run panel task history
rawCommits.body:
Seed run panel rows from the authoritative project task list so reloads or cleared local storage do not leave completed, failed, or active runs hidden behind an empty state.

Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: fix(interface): show loop runs in Run pane regardless of viewed chat
rawCommits.body:
The Run sidekick was filtering its task list by the URL's
`agentInstanceId`, but that param is the chat agent the user is viewing
while the loop runs on a separate `Loop`-role instance. Every
`task_started` row (and every `/loop/status` rehydration) carries the
loop instance id, so the chat-scoped filter dropped them all and the
pane stayed on "No tasks" the moment Run was pressed.

The Run pane is project-scoped UI, so query the panel store by project
only and let row-level project filtering handle isolation.

Made-with: Cursor
rawCommits.cleanSubject: show loop runs in Run pane regardless of viewed chat

rawCommits.subject: fix(server): pass agent permissions to dev loops
rawCommits.body:
Thread normalized agent permissions into automaton start requests so dev-loop runs use the same capability bundle as chat sessions.

Made-with: Cursor
rawCommits.cleanSubject: pass agent permissions to dev loops

rawCommits.subject: feat(agents): add list agents capability
rawCommits.body:
Expose list_agents as a first-class agent capability so CEO and permission UI bundles can grant the harness tool explicitly.

Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: refactor(server): split oversized server modules
rawCommits.body: Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: refactor(interface): clarify shell and output components
rawCommits.body: Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: refactor(interface): route server caches through queries
rawCommits.body: Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: fix(agents): default permissions to full access
rawCommits.body:
Normalize missing or empty agent permission bundles to the canonical full-access set so harness sessions get process invocation capabilities unless permissions are explicitly narrowed.

Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: refactor(interface): split stream handlers and subscriptions
rawCommits.body: Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: refactor(protocol): sync generated permission types
rawCommits.body: Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: refactor(crates): split oversized Rust modules
rawCommits.body: Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: fix(interface): keep image models out of chat picker
rawCommits.body: Made-with: Cursor
rawCommits.cleanSubject: keep image models out of chat picker

rawCommits.subject: refactor: route all model traffic through the Aura proxy
rawCommits.body:
Drop the `org_integration` BYOK auth path and direct provider catalog
entries (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, xAI, OpenRouter) so agents always
resolve through Aura-managed credits. Simplifies harness provider config,
billing checks, and the agent editor migration of legacy org-backed
agents, and collapses the chat model picker to a single Aura group.

Made-with: Cursor
rawCommits.cleanSubject: route all model traffic through the Aura proxy

rendered.title: Aura-managed models, sturdier streams, and a persistent desktop shell
rendered.intro: A heavy day across the stack: chat agents gained a native image-generation tool while every model request was consolidated onto the Aura proxy, the desktop shell stopped flashing on app switches, and the server hardened auth, harness backpressure, and stream recovery. A large internal split of oversized server and Rust modules sets up cleaner ownership without changing behavior.

entries.title: Recoverable spec drafts and richer agent stream logs
entries.summary: Streamed spec creation now survives model timeouts, and the server emits clearer agent stream summaries for debugging.

items.text: Streamed spec markdown is preserved when create_spec hits a model timeout, so partial drafts stay recoverable instead of vanishing, and agents are nudged away from oversized spec payloads.
Agent chat handlers now log stream output summaries across bootstrap, persistence, and tool dispatch paths to make production stream debugging easier.

entries.title: Desktop fails closed on an unhealthy harness sidecar
entries.summary: The desktop app no longer continues with a broken local harness when its startup probe never passes.

items.text: If the managed local harness sidecar never passes its startup health probe, the desktop now kills the process and refuses to proceed instead of silently running against a broken harness.

entries.title: Smoother task output streaming in the browser
entries.summary: Task output caching no longer thrashes browser storage during streaming updates.

items.text: The IndexedDB connection is reused across operations and task-output cache writes are debounced, eliminating the per-token localStorage parse-and-rewrite that made streaming feel janky.

entries.title: Aura-proxied models, generate_image tool, and a persistent desktop shell
entries.summary: The biggest thread of the day: chat agents gained a native image generation tool, all model traffic was unified behind the Aura proxy, the middle panel now persists across app switches, and the server tightened auth, permissions, and harness backpressure.

items.text: Chat agents can now fulfil natural-language requests like "create an image of a cat" through a new provider-less generate_image workspace tool that drains the upstream router SSE and returns a single ImageBlock-shaped result; gpt-image-2 is promoted to the default in both the chat input picker and the Aura 3D Image Generation app, and image-only models are kept out of the chat model picker.

All model traffic now resolves through Aura-managed credits: the org_integration BYOK path and direct Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, xAI, and OpenRouter catalog entries are removed, harness provider config and billing checks are simplified, and the chat model picker collapses to a single Aura group.

App switches no longer flash the wallpaper: the middle ResponsiveMainLane is lifted into a persistent DesktopShell host that retains DOM identity across navigations, with a bareMainPanel opt-out so the Desktop app keeps its transparent wallpaper-bleed surface.

The Run pane is fixed on two fronts: it now seeds rows from the authoritative project task list so reloads or cleared local storage no longer hide completed or active runs, and it queries the panel store by project instead of the viewed chat's agent id so loop runs show up the moment Run is pressed.

Server hardening: stale auth fallback is capped and sensitive routes fail closed, harness WebSocket commands are bounded with explicit delivery errors and redacted frame logging, dev-loop runs now receive the same normalized agent permissions as chat sessions, and missing permission bundles default to canonical full access so harness sessions keep process invocation capabilities.

list_agents is promoted to a first-class agent capability so CEO and permission UI bundles can grant the harness tool explicitly, and new agent control callback endpoints expose a dedicated server surface for managing agents.
Floating agent windows hide the "/ for commands" hint via a new ChatPanel compact mode, so narrow desktop agent windows no longer wrap the input info bar onto a second line.

Large structural cleanups landed under the hood: the server's app_builder, auth_guard, error, generation, router, and state modules were split into focused submodules, several oversized Rust crates (agents, core entities, network types, sessions, tasks, storage testutil) were broken up, and the interface stream handlers and server-cache stores were reorganized into smaller files and query hooks. No behavior change, but ownership is clearer and future work in these areas should land more safely.

media.alt: Aura-proxied models, persistent shell, and a hardened agent runtime
media.caption: All model traffic now routes through the Aura proxy, so the chat model picker collapses into a single Aura group.

entries.title: Desktop sidecar build re-triggered after ListAgents fix
entries.summary: A CI nudge to rebuild the desktop sidecar against the updated harness ListAgents capability.

items.text: Re-triggered the desktop sidecar build so the packaged harness picks up the new ListAgents capability landed earlier in the day.

entries.title: Changelog media planner stops duplicating proofs and respects mobile-only work
entries.summary: The release-time changelog media tooling got more discriminating about which commits warrant screenshots.

items.text: The changelog media planner now preserves explicit media targets and de-duplicates model-picker proofs via a new duplicate-surface skip reason, so reconciliations don't repeatedly seed the same screenshot.

Media inference seeding is hardened to skip mobile-only commits and pricing/benchmark plumbing without picker proof, recognize a debug capture surface, and route capture-bridge work through a tested helper, reducing low-signal screenshots in the published changelog.

highlights: All model traffic now flows through the Aura proxy
Persistent middle panel removes app-switch flash
Harness sidecar fails closed on unhealthy startup
Run pane restored from authoritative project tasks
